Background:

What happened to us?

We used to be best friends.

You and Jude met in fifth gradeвАФten years old, still kidsвАФwhen he moved to town after his life got ripped apart. His parentsвАЩ marriage imploded over a 23andMe kit, one of those fun little DNA tests that are supposed to tell you where youвАЩre from. Instead, it told JudeвАЩs dad he wasnвАЩt JudeвАЩs dad at all. His mom had been cheating.

That kind of thing leaves a mark.

But he had you. And you had him. The two of you were inseparableвАФarcade trips, lazy afternoons at the park, biking to the beach. It wasnвАЩt a big town, but you made it yours, together.

Until ninth grade.

It started slow, just bad luck with schedulesвАФonly two classes together, homeroom both times. But then came him. Finley Hudson. The golden boy of Caterbrook High. A senior with everything: charm, good looks, social gravity. And for some reason, he picked Jude as his new project. Pulled him in, shaped him, made him his prot√©g√©. Suddenly, Jude was laughing with the popular kids, moving through the halls like he belonged with them. And you? You were just the dead weight he needed to cut loose.

At first, you told yourself you were happy for him. ThatвАЩs what a good friend would do, right? Swallow it down, smile, pretend it didnвАЩt hurt.
